summary: Good matrix recording captures a solid performance with a well‑played set list
review: The show is praised for its excellent overall performance and a well‑chosen set list, with the band remembering most of the lyrics. The audio comes from Charlie Miller's UltraMatrix source, delivering clear and balanced sound that makes the recording worth listening to.

ai_rating.rationale: Single 4‑star review highlights a strong musical performance and a good-quality matrix recording, leading to an overall rating just above four stars.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Charlie Miller UltraMatrix source; clear, balanced sound with typical matrix ambience

show_quality.setlist_flow: Well‑played set list that kept the band on point throughout the show
